name: @murky-web/typebuddy
description: Your new best friend for simple typescript guards every project needs.

scripts.build: bun run clean && tsdown && cp ./biome/*.grit ./dist/ && cp ./biome/*.gritt ./dist/
scripts.lint: oxlint -c ../config/oxc/.oxlintrc.jsonc --type-aware src eslint biome tests tsdown.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint -c ../config/oxc/.oxlintrc.jsonc --type-aware --fix src eslint biome tests tsdown.config.ts
scripts.format: oxfmt -c ../config/oxc/.oxfmtrc.jsonc src eslint biome tests tsdown.config.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt -c ../config/oxc/.oxfmtrc.jsonc --check src eslint biome tests tsdown.config.ts
